title: lasianthaea fruticosa var. aggregata
intro: Lasianthaea fruticosa var. aggregata, also known as Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, Lasianthaea fruticosa var. aggregata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
